description_long: This is a modern Samsung microwave oven with a sleek, rectangular form and a predominantly black exterior. The front features a large, flat door with a subtle, integrated handle on the right side, and a vertical control panel adjacent to the handle. The control panel includes a digital display, several buttons, and a rotary dial, all arranged in a vertical stack. The microwave's surfaces are smooth and glossy, with minimal visible seams, giving it a contemporary and high-end appearance. The top, sides, and back are solid black with no visible vents or windows, emphasizing a minimalist design. The only visible branding is a small, centered 'Samsung' logo on the lower portion of the door.
description: A sleek, black Samsung microwave with a glossy finish, vertical control panel, and integrated handle. The design is modern and minimalistic, with branding on the front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black door, integrated handle on the right, vertical control panel with digital display, and Samsung logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid, featureless black panel with no visible controls, vents, or windows.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted black surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a solid black panel and a slight protrusion from the handle area.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white 'Samsung' logo is centered on the lower portion of the front door, contrasting against the black surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a series of buttons and a rotary dial below. The buttons are arranged in a column, and the display is illuminated in blue.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, integrated bar on the right edge of the door, slightly protruding and made of plastic or coated metal, designed for easy gripping and pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on the top, sides, or rear surfaces in the provided views.
